headline_summary: Houthis to resume attacks on Red Sea shipping after US-Israeli strikes on Iran.
Gulf states considering military response to Iranian strikes.
Iranian attacks on Oman and other Gulf states escalate tensions.
Shipping companies suspend operations in the Strait of Hormuz.
Potential spike in global oil prices due to maritime disruptions.

Energy: Increased oil prices expected due to supply disruptions.
Shipping costs likely to rise as routes are altered.
War risk premiums for shipping in the region may increase.

risk_drivers: Escalating military conflict in the Gulf region.
Potential closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

watchlist.why: Expected price increase due to supply disruptions.
